createEvent.title: Create Event
createEvent.description: Build a new event in steps, then define dynamic registration questions or start from a reusable template.

entry.title: Creation Path
entry.description: Choose whether to start from a reusable template or define a new event mode from scratch.
entry.templateDescription: Load a saved template and inherit its event mode and registration structure.
entry.blankDescription: Create a new event from scratch and choose the mode that matches its workflow.
entry.modeDescription: Event mode controls whether registration is club-only, roster-based, or class-assignment ready.
entry.templateMode: This template will create a {mode} event.
entry.selectTemplatePrompt: Choose a template to continue with the template-based flow.

createEvent.templatesDescription: Templates snapshot the current event wizard fields so future events can reuse the same setup without rebuilding it.
createEvent.templatesEmpty: No event templates saved yet. Fill out the wizard below and save the draft as your first template.
createEvent.dynamicFieldCount: {count, plural, one {# dynamic field} other {# dynamic fields}}
createEvent.loadedTemplate: Loaded template {name} ({mode}). All values below are editable before saving a new event.

eventBasics.title: Event Basics
eventBasics.description: Set event name and start/end dates.

registration.title: Registration & Location
registration.description: Configure registration windows, pricing, and location details.

questions.title: Dynamic Questions
questions.description: Add optional custom form questions for event registrations.

wizard.descriptionPlaceholder: Public event description or planning notes
wizard.saveAsTemplateDescription: Save the current draft as a reusable template. Loaded templates can be updated in place.
wizard.templateDescriptionPlaceholder: Reusable schedule, pricing, and form setup
wizard.templateActive: Keep this template active for future event creation

validation.missingTemplate: Choose an event template or switch to Start Blank.
validation.missingEventMode: Select an event mode before creating a blank event.
validation.missingLabel: Dynamic field {index} is missing a label.
validation.missingOptions: Dynamic field "{label}" must include at least one option.
validation.missingConditionalOperator: Dynamic field "{label}" is missing a conditional operator.
validation.missingConditionalSource: Dynamic field "{label}" must select a conditional source field.
validation.missingConditionalValue: Dynamic field "{label}" is missing a conditional value.

dynamicBuilder.title: Build the registration form
dynamicBuilder.description: Add club questions, attendee questions, and sections in the same order you want directors to see them. Advanced settings are still available when you need them.
dynamicBuilder.addQuestionDescription: Ask one question for the whole club registration.
dynamicBuilder.addAttendeeFieldDescription: Ask the same question once for each selected attendee.
dynamicBuilder.addSectionDescription: Group related questions under a shared heading.
dynamicBuilder.emptyTitle: Start with a question or section
dynamicBuilder.empty: No questions have been added yet. Add a question for the club, an attendee field, or a section to organize a longer form.
dynamicBuilder.topLevelQuestionsDescription: These questions appear directly on the registration form.
dynamicBuilder.sectionsDescription: Use sections to group related questions and give the form a clearer flow.
dynamicBuilder.fieldCardDescription: Choose the answer style, decide if it is required, and add help text only if it is useful.
dynamicBuilder.sectionCardDescription: Sections hold related questions together and can also be shown conditionally.
dynamicBuilder.questionPlaceholder: What do you need directors to answer?
dynamicBuilder.sectionHelpTextPlaceholder: Explain what belongs in this section.
dynamicBuilder.descriptionPlaceholder: Add guidance directors should see before submitting.
dynamicBuilder.requiredHint: Turn this on if the answer must be provided.
dynamicBuilder.sectionBadgeDescription: Sections organize the form and do not collect answers themselves.
dynamicBuilder.optionsDescriptionSingle: Directors can choose one answer from this list.
dynamicBuilder.optionsDescriptionMulti: Directors can choose one or more answers from this list.
dynamicBuilder.addAtLeastOneOption: Add at least one option for this question.
dynamicBuilder.keyDescription: This internal key is used to save responses and should stay stable once people start registering.
dynamicBuilder.conditionalDescriptionField: Show this question only when a club-level question matches the condition.
dynamicBuilder.conditionalDescriptionSection: Show this section only when a club-level question matches the condition.
dynamicBuilder.noComparisonValue: No comparison value needed for this operator.
dynamicBuilder.sectionQuestionsDescription: Add club questions or attendee questions inside this section.
dynamicBuilder.addChildFieldsHint: This section is ready for questions. Add a club question or attendee question to get started.

operationalReports.spiritualDescription: Entries pulled from baptism_names and bible_names across all submitted or approved registrations.
operationalReports.dutyDescription: Clubs grouped by selections in duty_first, duty_second, and special_activity.
operationalReports.avDescription: Clubs with AV-related responses and exact equipment details.

empty.spiritual: No baptism or bible-study names were submitted.
empty.duty: No duty or activity selections were submitted.
empty.av: No AV or equipment requests were submitted.

medical.dietaryEmpty: No dietary restrictions were reported for submitted or approved registrations.
medical.medicalEmpty: No medical flags were reported for submitted or approved registrations.

nav.title: Club Director
nav.description: Roster readiness, event workflows, and class coordination.

common.activitiesInMonth: {count, plural, one {# activity in this month} other {# activities in this month}}

dashboard.description: Manage roster readiness, event registrations, and class workflows from one place.
dashboard.clubNotFoundDescription: The selected club could not be loaded for dashboard workflows.

metrics.adultClearancesEmpty: No active roster year compliance data.

snapshot.title: Readiness Snapshot
snapshot.description: Derived health indicators built from your live roster, compliance, event, report, and activity data.
snapshot.healthAreas: {count, plural, one {# health area} other {# health areas}}

upcomingEvents.title: Upcoming Events
upcomingEvents.empty: No upcoming events are available at this time.

compliance.title: Compliance Readiness
compliance.description: Sterling clearance status for the active roster year. Conference admins still control sync preview/apply.
compliance.empty: No active roster-year compliance snapshot is available yet.
compliance.clear: No adult roster members are currently missing Sterling clearance.

alerts.title: Action Alerts
alerts.noActiveRoster: No active roster year found. Run annual rollover before event registration.
alerts.missingClearance: {count} staff/director member(s) are missing Sterling clearance and can block submissions.
alerts.noUpcomingEvents: No upcoming events are currently published by conference administration.

events.title: Event Registration
events.description: Open an event to select attendees, complete dynamic forms, and submit your club registration.
events.empty: No upcoming events are currently available.

eventDetail.clubNotFoundDescription: The selected club could not be loaded before registering for events.
eventDetail.camporeeDescription: These scores are attached to your existing event registration and do not replace the normal registration workflow.

registrationForm.modulesDescription: Work through each section in order. Conditional sections will appear when earlier answers require them.
registrationForm.rosterDescription: Select all roster members from your club who will attend this event.
registrationForm.clubDescription: Complete the club-wide questions that drive the rest of the registration.
registrationForm.rosterSectionDescription: Select the club members attending this event.
registrationForm.groupDefaultDescription: Finish this registration section before moving on.
registrationForm.selectAttendeeFirst: Select at least one attendee to answer this question.
registrationForm.chooseRosterMember: Choose one or more roster members.
registrationForm.reviewDescription: Review attendees, pricing, class-assignment readiness, and missing fields before you submit.
registrationForm.reviewBadge: {count, plural, one {# issue to resolve} other {# issues to resolve}}
registrationForm.reviewCardDescription: Validation, attendee summary, pricing, and final submit.
registrationForm.validationSummaryShort: {count, plural, one {# issue still needs attention} other {# issues still need attention}}
registrationForm.reviewReadyDescription: This registration is ready to submit when you are.
registrationForm.attendeeSummaryEmpty: No attendees are currently selected for this registration.
registrationForm.classAssignmentIssuesSummary: {count, plural, one {# attendee still needs class preferences or placement} other {# attendees still need class preferences or placement}}
registrationForm.classAssignmentIssuesClear: Every selected attendee already has recorded class preferences or a placement for this event.
registrationForm.missingAttendeeSelection: Select at least one attendee before submitting registration.
registrationForm.activePrompts: {count, plural, one {# active prompt} other {# active prompts}}
registrationForm.walkInFormDescription: Walk-in attendees are added to this event only and will not carry over during yearly rollover.

roster.description: Review this year's active roster, update member details, and run your annual rollover.
roster.clubNotFoundDescription: The selected club could not be loaded for roster management.
roster.rolloverDescription: No active roster was found for {year}. Copy active members from {previousYear} into a new active roster year.
roster.activeMembers: {count, plural, one {# Active Member} other {# Active Members}}
roster.noRosterYearsDescription: Create your first roster year for {year}, then start adding members.

rosterTable.title: Roster Members
rosterTable.description: Manage the active members for the current roster year.
rosterTable.missingConsentsTitle: Missing one or more required consents
rosterTable.empty: No active members found in this roster year yet.

form.backgroundCheckHelp: Required for staff, directors, and counselors.
form.agreementsDescription: Capture parent/guardian consent confirmations and key health record details.
form.photoReleaseText: I authorize Pathfinder activities to capture and use photos/videos of my child for club communications and ministry promotion.
form.medicalConsentText: I authorize staff to secure emergency medical care when I cannot be reached, including transport and treatment as needed.
form.membershipAgreementText: I agree to Pathfinder participation standards, expectations, and parent/guardian responsibilities for this membership year.

reports.title: {clubName} Reporting Engine
reports.description: Replace paper submissions by sending your monthly metrics directly to the Conference.
reports.autoFillDescription: Load a month to review club activities, then submit the monthly report with editable auto-filled values.
reports.usingRosterYear: Using roster year {yearLabel} for {month}. Monthly report values will auto-fill from the logged activities below, but you can still edit them before submit.
reports.noRosterYearForMonth: No roster year covers this month yet. Add or activate the correct roster year before logging activity for this month.
reports.existingReport: An existing report already exists for this month, so the form is preloaded with the saved report values.
reports.monthlyReportDescription: Points are auto-calculated when you submit: {meetings} points per meeting, {pathfinder} per Pathfinder average attendance, {staff} per staff average attendance, plus uniform compliance bonus up to {uniformMax}.
reports.activityDescription: Log activities for {month} so the monthly report can auto-fill from real attendance data.
reports.activityTitlePlaceholder: Club meeting, drill practice, outreach night...
reports.noActivities: No club activities have been logged for this month yet.
reports.noRecentReports: No monthly reports have been submitted yet.

nominations.title: Submit Conference Nomination
nominations.description: Nominate a Pathfinder from {clubName} for conference recognition.
nominations.formTitle: Pathfinder of the Year Nomination Form
nominations.formDescription: Share a clear, specific case for this Pathfinder's impact, service, and leadership.
nominations.empty: No active roster members were found. Activate a roster year and add members before submitting a nomination.
nominations.justificationPlaceholder: Why is this Pathfinder deserving of this award?
nominations.communityServicePlaceholder: Describe meaningful service projects, consistency, and outcomes.
nominations.leadershipPlaceholder: Describe leadership shown in club life, mentoring, and initiative.

tlt.title: {clubName} TLT Dashboard
tlt.description: Track TLT applications, baptism status, honors progress, and uniform sizing.
tlt.clubNotFoundDescription: The selected club could not be loaded for TLT applications.
tlt.noActiveRosterDescription: Activate a roster year and assign TLT members before starting applications.
tlt.noMembers: No TLT members in active roster
tlt.noMembersDescription: Add members with the TLT role to the active roster to begin applications.

classes.clubNotFoundDescription: You need a valid club before assigning event classes.
classes.description: Assign each registered attendee to one event class. Capacity updates live as enrollments are made.
classes.notEnabled: This event is not configured for class assignment. Switch to the event registration flow or create a class-assignment event mode for future events.

board.attendeesDescription: Choose an attendee for detail actions, or select multiple attendees for bulk assignment.
board.selectAttendee: Select an attendee to start assigning classes.
board.alreadyAssignedOther: Already assigned to another event class
